data: {"response": {"candidates": [{"content": {"role": "model","parts": [{"thoughtSignature": "","functionCall": {"name": "replace_file_content","args": {"AllowMultiple": false,"ReplacementContent": "  const flushPending = () =\u003e {\n    if (currentRole === \"user\") {\n      const content = pendingUserContent.join(\"\\n\\n\").trim() || \"continue\";\n      const userMsg = {\n        userInputMessage: {\n          content: content,\n          modelId: \"\"\n        }\n      };\n\n      // Attach images if present (Kiro API supports images field)\n      if (pendingImages.length \u003e 0) {\n        userMsg.userInputMessage.images = pendingImages;\n      }\n\n      if (pendingToolResults.length \u003e 0) {\n        userMsg.userInputMessage.userInputMessageContext = {\n          toolResults: pendingToolResults\n        };\n      }\n\n      // Add tools to the first emitted user turn. We track a flag instead of\n      // relying on `history.length === 0` because the first few messages may\n      // be assistant turns (e.g. when role=undefined collapses to a prior\n      // assistant turn), in which case the first user flush would already see\n      // a non-empty history and lose the tools schema.\n      if (tools && tools.length \u003e 0 && !toolsAttached) {\n        if (!userMsg.userInputMessage.userInputMessageContext) {\n          userMsg.userInputMessage.userInputMessageContext = {};\n        }\n        userMsg.userInputMessage.userInputMessageContext.tools = tools.map(t =\u003e {\n          const name = t.function?.name || t.name;\n          let description = t.function?.description || t.description || \"\";\n\n          if (!description.trim()) {\n            description = `Tool: ${name}`;\n          }\n\n          const schema = t.function?.parameters || t.parameters || t.input_schema || {};\n          // Normalize schema: Kiro requires required[] and proper type/properties\n          const normalizedSchema = Object.keys(schema).length === 0\n            ? { type: \"object\", properties: {}, required: [] }\n            : { ...schema, required: schema.required ?? [] };\n\n          return {\n            toolSpecification: {\n              name,\n              description,\n              inputSchema: { json: normalizedSchema }\n            }\n          };\n        });\n        toolsAttached = true;\n      }\n\n      history.push(userMsg);\n      currentMessage = userMsg;\n      pendingUserContent = [];\n      pendingToolResults = [];\n      pendingImages = [];\n    } else if (currentRole === \"assistant\") {\n      const content = pendingAssistantContent.join(\"\\n\\n\").trim() || \"...\";\n      const assistantMsg = {\n        assistantResponseMessage: {\n          content: content\n        }\n      };\n      history.push(assistantMsg);\n      pendingAssistantContent = [];\n    }\n  };\n","TargetContent": "  const flushPending = () =\u003e {\n    if (currentRole === \"user\") {\n      const content = pendingUserContent.join(\"\\n\\n\").trim() || \"continue\";\n      const userMsg = {\n        userInputMessage: {\n          content: content,\n          modelId: \"\"\n        }\n      };\n\n      // Attach images if present (Kiro API supports images field)\n      if (pendingImages.length \u003e 0) {\n        userMsg.userInputMessage.images = pendingImages;\n      }\n\n      if (pendingToolResults.length \u003e 0) {\n        userMsg.userInputMessage.userInputMessageContext = {\n          toolResults: pendingToolResults\n        };\n      }\n\n      // Add tools to first user message\n      if (tools && tools.length \u003e 0 && history.length === 0) {\n        // Add tools to the first emitted user turn. We track a flag instead of\n        // relying on `history.length === 0` because the first few messages may\n        // be assistant turns (e.g. when role=undefined collapses to a prior\n        // assistant turn), in which case the first user flush would already see\n        // a non-empty history and lose the tools schema.\n        if (tools && tools.length \u003e 0 && !toolsAttached) {\n          if (!userMsg.userInputMessage.userInputMessageContext) {\n            userMsg.userInputMessage.userInputMessageContext = {};\n          }\n          userMsg.userInputMessage.userInputMessageContext.tools = tools.map(t =\u003e {\n            const name = t.function?.name || t.name;\n            let description = t.function?.description || t.description || \"\";\n\n\n            if (!description.trim()) {\n              description = `Tool: ${name}`;\n            }\n\n\n            const schema = t.function?.parameters || t.parameters || t.input_schema || {};\n            // Normalize schema: Kiro requires required[] and proper type/properties\n            const normalizedSchema = Object.keys(schema).length === 0\n              ? { type: \"object\", properties: {}, required: [] }\n              : { ...schema, required: schema.required ?? [] };\n\n            return {\n              toolSpecification: {\n                name,\n                description,\n                inputSchema: { json: normalizedSchema }\n              }\n            };\n          });\n          toolsAttached = true;\n        }\n\n        history.push(userMsg);\n        currentMessage = userMsg;\n        pendingUserContent = [];\n        pendingToolResults = [];\n        pendingImages = [];\n      } else if (currentRole === \"assistant\") {\n        const content = pendingAssistantContent.join(\"\\n\\n\").trim() || \"...\";\n        const assistantMsg = {\n          assistantResponseMessage: {\n            content: content\n          }\n        };\n        history.push(assistantMsg);\n        pendingAssistantContent = [];\n      }\n    };\n","TargetFile": "f:\\AUDIRA-ROUTET\\open-sse\\translator\\request\\openai-to-kiro.js","StartLine": 33,"EndLine": 108,"Description": "Fix unclosed bracket and logic error in flushPending","Instruction": "Fix the unclosed block and incorrectly wrapped logic in `flushPending`."},"id": "4oelujjl"}}]}}],"usageMetadata": {"promptTokenCount": 65626,"candidatesTokenCount": 1368,"totalTokenCount": 67668,"thoughtsTokenCount": 674},"modelVersion": "gemini-pro-default","responseId": "vLMLaoHNOczd4-EPrdfXqAc"},"traceId": "4a971662b194dfcb","metadata": {}}
